title: ZKPassport’s new Private FaceMatch with Theo Madzou | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
In this session, Théo Madzou, Founder at ZKPassport, shows how to use Apple and Google App Attestations in Noir.

Learn how app attestations can be integrated into Noir to strengthen trust and security in privacy-preserving applications.
